blockingIssues.description: The committed validation assets only add mock-backed `httptest` coverage in `internal/server/cross_area_test.go` and `test/e2e/cross_area_test.go` instead of a repeatable repo-side live validation asset that drives a booted `giro` process on `127.0.0.1:8080` through the full matrix from one resolved credential source.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared validation notes do not preserve the concrete request payloads/transcripts needed to rerun the advanced local matrix without reconstructing ad hoc curl commands from a worker transcript.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is downstream of the blocking feature bug: the missing reusable live validation asset should be fixed in repo-side code/assets first, and adding documentation-only payload notes now would be partial and outside this scrutiny run's scope.
